name: get_city_data
description: Retrieve real-time air quality and weather data for a specific city by providing its exact name, state, and country. Returns the same data as nearest_city: AQI values (US and China), main pollutant, temperature, humidity, pressure, wind, and weather condition. Use the list endpoints first to get valid city, state, and country names.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name (must match exactly as returned by the list_cities endpoint).

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: State or province name (must match exactly as returned by the list_states endpoint).

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Country name (must match exactly as returned by the list_countries endpoint).
